query:
SELECT 
  pb.id,
  pb.length,
  pb.width,
  pb.height,
  pb.cbm,
  pb.grossWeight,
  pb.netWeight,
  pv.variantCode,
  pv.variantName
FROM package_boxes pb
JOIN product_variants pv ON pb.variantId = pv.id
WHERE pv.variantCode = 'DC-001-GRY-V034'
ORDER BY pb.id DESC;
